description: Returns various properties for the respawning vehicle (see [[Vehicle Respawn]]). All properties are synched over the network and should be the same on every client including [[JIP]].
name: getRespawnVehicleInfo

ArraySized.desc: how long the vehicle will be in respawn queue after death. -1 - 'missionRespawnDelay' value is used.
ArraySized.name: respawnDelay

ArraySized.desc: how many times left for the vehicle to respawn. -1 - indefinite, 0 - no more respawns
ArraySized.name: respawnCount

ArraySized.desc: if [[true]] then the old wreck will be deleted when vehicle respawns.
ArraySized.name: deleteOldWreck

ArraySized.desc: if [[true]] the wreck will be transfered to the server and vehicle will respawn on server.
ArraySized.name: respawnOnServer

ArraySized.desc: if [[true]] vehicle will not be forced to the ground and if can fly and has pilot will be spawned flying.
ArraySized.name: respawnFlying

ArraySized.desc: pilot/driver unit that will be placed into the new vehicle.
ArraySized.name: respawnUnit

ArraySized.desc: individual respawn mode for this vehicle. Any mode other than 2,3 or -1 means disabled respawn. -1 - use 'missionRespawnMode'
ArraySized.name: respawnMode

ArraySized.desc: what side markers to use for respawn. For example if 'respawnSide' set to [[east]] the markers with names 'respawn_vehicle_eastXXX' and 'respawn_eastXXX' will be used.
ArraySized.name: respawnSide

ArraySized.desc: align respawned vehicle with respawn marker direction or with wreck direction if no marker found or "INSTANT" mode is used. Otherwise, direction is random.
ArraySized.name: useRespawnMarkerDir

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if vehicle is respawnable (all conditions for respawn are ok)
ArraySized.name: canRespawn

ArraySized.desc: [[true]] if vehicle is currently in the respawn queue awaiting respawn.
ArraySized.name: isRespawning

ArraySized.desc: Chosen vehicle respawn marker, when vehicle respawns it will use the marker params. The respawn marker is processed instantly uppon vehicle's death.
ArraySized.name: respawnMarkerName

ArraySized.desc: how long left before the respawn. -1 after vehicle has respawned or has respawn disabled.
ArraySized.name: respawnTimeRemaining

ArraySized.desc: global mission vehicle respawn delay. script command > mission param > 3DEN param
ArraySized.name: missionRespawnDelay

ArraySized.desc: global mission vehicle respawn mode. script command > mission param > 3DEN param
ArraySized.name: missionRespawnMode

ret.desc: depends on the requested property, or [[Nothing]]

Item.desc: property index (see main syntax, for example 10 for isRespawning)
Item.name: index
